data.name: 淫慾試煉
data.detailed_description:
和妻子一起冒險的時候和雇傭的戰士bob一起困於魅魔迷宮的深處墓穴

在意外喚醒了魅魔女王後

被其強制要求進行8次的肉慾試煉

在媚毒與試煉的影響下

你的妻子會在你的協助下保持對你的忠貞

還是在你的影響下被間男給佔有

遊戲特色:

全動畫H場景

50+H動畫場景

(不包含日常Q圖事件)

完整的雙路線

除了可以享受純愛線滿載的愛意

亦能體驗NTR線的快感

同時內有許多充滿Q圖與妻子的日常互動

探索與研究樹 (無戰鬥內容)

透過各種研究與煉金術來協助妻子保持理性

而素材可以通過探索獲得

多套服裝

遊戲中的服裝會對妻子造成不同的效果

並且會有不同的場景可觀看

多結局

除了純愛結局和NTR結局以外

還有普通壞結局與研究結局

同時會依照研究數值的多寡影響結局分支

回想房間

包含全場景開放系統

data.short_description: 在魅魔女王的試煉中, 妻子是否會在你的協助下保持對你的忠貞, 還是在你的影響下被間男給佔有
data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2.5+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Trial of lust
data.detailed_description:
While adventuring with your wife,

you and the hired warrior Bob become trapped in a Succubus's tomb.

After accidentally awakening the Succubus Queen,

you're forced to complete eight trials of lust.

Under the effects of lust poison and the trials,

will your wife remain faithful to you with your help,

or will she be taken by another man under your influence?

Game Features:

Fully Animated H-Scenes

Total of 50+ sex scenes are all animation

(excluding daily mini-events with cute pictures)

Two route

Full route for both NTR and love route

Both routes feature plenty of daily events with cute pictures

that include interactions with your wife.

Exploration and Research Tree (No Combat)

Assist your wife in maintaining her sanity through research and alchemy.

Materials for research can be gathered through exploration.

Multiple Outfits

Various outfits for your wife will have different effects and unlock new scenes.

Multiple Endings

In addition to love and NTR endings,

there are also normal bad endings and research endings,

with branching paths influenced by the research points.

Gallery Room

which includes a system to unlock every erotic scene.
